title: 📝 كتابة موضوع عن قطعة الملابس المفضلة
prompts: 1. What is your favorite piece of clothes?
2. Who helps you choose your clothes?
3. How often do you buy clothes?
4. What do you prefer: in-store or online shopping? Why?
model: My favorite piece of clothes is a shirt. My mom usually helps me when buying my clothes. I often buy clothes once a month. I prefer online shopping because it is easier and cheaper.

second_prompt.title: موضوع إضافي: ملابسك المفضلة
questions: 1. What kind of clothes do you usually wear?
2. Where do you usually buy clothes?
3. What's your favorite piece of clothing?
4. What do you do with clothes that you no longer wear? Why?
second_prompt.model: I usually wear a skirt and a blouse. I buy clothes from online stores like Amazon. Sometimes I buy them from Red Sea mall. My favorite items of clothing are T-shirts and trousers. I donate the clothes that I no longer need to help people in need. I like comfortable clothes. I don't like formal clothes. I wear skirts and blouses which are very cool. I don't worry about fashion, but I try to wear clothes that look good on me.
